result.summary: The interface is well-designed with no critical visual breaks. Only a minor styling refinement is suggested for the bottom navigation bar.

issues.description: The bottom navigation bar icons, particularly the 'Casino' cherry icon, are positioned very close to the bottom edge, which may lead to clipping on certain screen resolutions.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the vertical alignment or padding of the bottom navigation icons to ensure adequate clearance from the screen edge.
